T0027.title: Profitable Target
T0027.definition: A term used in underground fraud circles to indicate that a fraudulent activity or target offers high financial returns.
T0027.description: Operators use "meat" as slang for profit. "Has meat" signifies that attacking a specific platform, participating in a marketing campaign, or executing a particular fraud technique can yield substantial illicit gains. Assessing whether a target "has meat" is the core criterion for fraud rings when deciding whether to commit resources and manpower to an attack. Campaigns involving high cashback, large no-threshold vouchers, or high-value physical gifts are typically flagged as targets that "have meat."
